**Diagnostic report**
In George's Words: Troubleshooting → "Save Diagnostic Report…" and attach
the file here. It contains versions and status only — never your voice,
transcripts, or dictionary.

**Which app were you dictating into?** (Mail, Slack, Chrome, …)
